pull.title: perf: Port the separate reduce kernel mode from trtllm.
pull.body:
<!-- .github/pull_request_template.md -->

## 📌 Description

This also updated the kernels which fixed mha perf regression and fp8 sink attention accuracy issue.

<!-- What does this PR do? Briefly describe the changes and why they’re needed. -->

## 🔍 Related Issues

<!-- Link any related issues here -->

## 🚀 Pull Request Checklist

Thank you for contributing to FlashInfer! Before we review your pull request, please make sure the following items are complete.

### ✅ Pre-commit Checks

- [x] I have installed `pre-commit` by running `pip install pre-commit` (or used your preferred method).
- [x] I have installed the hooks with `pre-commit install`.
- [ ] I have run the hooks manually with `pre-commit run --all-files` and fixed any reported issues.

> If you are unsure about how to set up `pre-commit`, see [the pre-commit documentation](https://pre-commit.com/).

## 🧪 Tests

- [ ] Tests have been added or updated as needed.
- [ ] All tests are passing (`unittest`, etc.).

## Reviewer Notes

@@ -109,7 +109,7 @@ def get_available_cubin_files(source, retries=3, delay=5, timeout=10):
 
 
 class ArtifactPath:
-    TRTLLM_GEN_FMHA: str = "037e528e719ec3456a7d7d654f26b805e44c63b1/fmha/trtllm-gen/"
+    TRTLLM_GEN_FMHA: str = "538f8e38ace07f701f61e26b138b2b8c70ce9e8e/fmha/trtllm-gen/"
     TRTLLM_GEN_BMM: str = (
         "e6f22dcc3fdeb29ff87af2f4a2cb3d30b8d273e0/batched_gemm-45beda1-ee6a802/"
     )
@@ -122,7 +122,7 @@ class ArtifactPath:
 
 class MetaInfoHash:
     TRTLLM_GEN_FMHA: str = (
-        "0ff77215b86997665cf75973e13cd2932f551d46b4e008f851d32d47e1d9560f"
+        "71f06a8fc03d28cc94ee6fc180fb7e37256a9e1c30ab2a6c0bf20a2d97af3eff"
     )
     TRTLLM_GEN_BMM: str = (
         "c98b4ce69a39fd41556d67033c30ea814ef76b0a2fe16e798e55baf0104acc34"

@@ -1584,6 +1584,7 @@ def gen_trtllm_gen_fmha_module():
         "fmha_gen",
         [
             jit_env.FLASHINFER_CSRC_DIR / "trtllm_fmha_kernel_launcher.cu",
+            jit_env.FLASHINFER_CSRC_DIR / "fmhaReduction.cu",
         ],
         extra_ldflags=["-lcuda"],
         # link "include" sub-directory in cache

@@ -0,0 +1,34 @@
+/*

+
+#pragma once
+
+#include "flashInferMetaInfo.h"
+#include "fmhaRunnerParams.h"
+#include "kernelParams.h"
+
+namespace tensorrt_llm {
+namespace kernels {
+
+////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
+
+void runFmhaReduction(TllmGenFmhaKernelMetaInfo const& kernelMeta, KernelParams const& params,
+                      int32_t multiProcessorCount, bool enable_pdl, cudaStream_t stream);
+
+////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
+
+}  // namespace kernels
+}  // namespace tensorrt_llm

@@ -18,6 +18,7 @@
 import pytest
 import torch
 from sink_attention_reference import sink_attention_unified
+from conftest import assert_close_with_mismatch_tolerance
 
 import flashinfer
 from flashinfer.utils import get_compute_capability
@@ -121,7 +122,13 @@ def test_blackwell_trtllm_gen_decode_attention_sink(
     else:
         raise ValueError(f"Unsupported dtype: {dtype}")
 
-    torch.testing.assert_close(o_ref, output, atol=atol, rtol=rtol)
+    assert_close_with_mismatch_tolerance(
+        o_ref,
+        output,
+        atol=atol,
+        rtol=rtol,
+        max_mismatched_elements=int(output.numel() * 0.01),
+    )
 
 
 @pytest.mark.parametrize("dtype", [torch.float16, torch.bfloat16])
